section_name: Outsourcing Production of Renewal Notices; Paid Advertising
text: The board may authorize the department to enter into a contract with a private vendor to produce and distribute motor vehicle registration renewal notices. The contract may provide for the inclusion of paid advertising in the registration renewal notice packet.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.1515 — Outsourcing Production of Renewal Notices; Paid Advertising

The board may authorize the department to enter into a contract with a private vendor to produce and distribute motor vehicle registration renewal notices. The contract may provide for the inclusion of paid advertising in the registration renewal notice packet.

*Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 933 (H.B.3097), Sec. 2E.05, eff. September 1, 2009.*
